prose:
The HOMO–LUMO gap of molecular oxygen was computed using DFT (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) with PySCF in the gas phase. Calculation assumed a charge of 0 and a spin multiplicity of 3 (triplet state). The geometry used was sourced from the file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` and not re-optimized. The calculation achieved SCF convergence within 7 cycles, and all integrity checks passed. 

The computed HOMO energy is −8.8740 eV, LUMO energy is −3.5859 eV, giving a HOMO–LUMO gap of **5.2881 eV**.
